description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses python:3 as the default Docker image and defines three jobs. Add a code_check job that runs on all branches except master, overrides the image to python:3.5-alpine, and executes pip install 'coala-bears[alldeps]' followed by coala --ci. Add a tests job that also runs on all branches except master, uses the default python:3 image, and runs pip install -r requirements.txt then mkdocs build. Add a pages job that runs only on the master branch, uses the default python:3 image, runs pip install -r requirements.txt, mkdocs build, moves the generated site directory to public, and publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. No caches, services, or additional stages are defined.
